message:
feat(db): add SQLite init gate, pool stats sampler, and PRAGMA ordering fix

Split PRAGMAs into per-connection (busy_timeout, synchronous, cache_size,
etc.) and per-database-file (journal_mode=WAL) sets, with busy_timeout
first to prevent SQLITE_BUSY before the timeout applies. Add an async
OnceCell init gate per sqlite path so WAL mode and migrations run exactly
once regardless of pool concurrency.

Introduce DbPoolStatsSampler (250ms bounded frequency) publishing pool
utilization gauges to global_metrics(): active/idle/total/pending
connections, rolling 60s peak active, and over-80%-utilization timestamp.
Record acquire latency/count/errors on every pool.acquire().

Re-export auto_pool_size from crate root. Add 50-thread stress test
proving no SQLITE_BUSY during concurrent pool warmup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
